title: Public Company Filing
description: SEC or equivalent regulatory filing from a publicly traded company, including financial statements and key metrics.

company_name.description: Legal name of the filing company. Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR, filing header.

company_domain.description: Primary website domain of the company. Commonly found in: company website, IR page.

cik.description: SEC Central Index Key (CIK) number. Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol. Commonly found in: exchange listing, filing cover page.

exchange.description: Stock exchange where the company is listed. Commonly found in: filing cover page, exchange website.

filing_type.description: Type of regulatory filing. Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR form type, filing header.

period_of_report.description: The period covered by this report (YYYY-MM-DD). Commonly found in: filing cover page, period of report field.

filed_date.description: Date the filing was submitted (YYYY-MM-DD). Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR filing date, filing header.

document_url.description: Direct URL to the primary filing document. Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR documents page.

revenue_usd.description: Total revenue in USD for the reporting period. Commonly found in: income statement, financial highlights.

gross_profit_usd.description: Gross profit in USD. Commonly found in: income statement.

operating_income_usd.description: Operating income (EBIT) in USD. Commonly found in: income statement.

net_income_usd.description: Net income in USD. Commonly found in: income statement, financial highlights.

ebitda_usd.description: EBITDA in USD. Commonly found in: financial highlights, non-GAAP disclosures.

total_assets_usd.description: Total assets in USD. Commonly found in: balance sheet.

total_liabilities_usd.description: Total liabilities in USD. Commonly found in: balance sheet.

cash_and_equivalents_usd.description: Cash and cash equivalents in USD. Commonly found in: balance sheet, cash flow statement.

total_debt_usd.description: Total debt in USD. Commonly found in: balance sheet, debt schedule.

shares_outstanding.description: Number of shares outstanding. Commonly found in: balance sheet, cover page.

eps_basic.description: Basic earnings per share. Commonly found in: income statement, EPS table.

eps_diluted.description: Diluted earnings per share. Commonly found in: income statement, EPS table.

guidance_revenue_low.description: Low end of revenue guidance in USD. Commonly found in: outlook section, press release.

guidance_revenue_high.description: High end of revenue guidance in USD. Commonly found in: outlook section, press release.

auditor_name.description: Name of the external auditor. Commonly found in: auditor's report, 10-K notes.

source_url.description: URL of the source page where this filing was found. Commonly found in: SEC EDGAR, IR website.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: scraper metadata.
